Appearances:
Plaintiff, aurora Loan Services is present. Represented by Raoul Pangilinan.
Attorney, Robert Cohen, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant,Nelly Martinez , is present.
Attorney, Mia Hernandez , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
